use_cases: Toggle between light, dark, and dim theme modes in a single UI control
Provide users with visual preference options for app appearance
Add a polished, Apple-inspired theme switching control to any application
Switch between day/night viewing modes with smooth animated transitions
ai_summary: An Apple-inspired theme switcher component featuring a liquid glass aesthetic with light, dark, and dim mode options. The component uses glass-morphism styling with smooth hover and click animations to toggle between theme states. Icons represent each theme mode with a sun and moon design pattern.
